description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine dc2int_2, and is implemented by a call to dc2int_2. Use this API to return integer two-terminal dc line quantities. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, ival = dc2int(n, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the dc line quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Bus number of rectifier end of dc line.
Bus number of inverter end of dc line.
Bus number of metered end of dc line.
Number of bridges in series rectifier end.
Number of bridges in series inverter end.
Firing angle status rectifier end: (-1) low; (0) regulating; (1) high.
Firing angle status inverter end: (-1) low; (0) regulating (1) high.
Tap status rectifier end: (-1) low; (0) regulating; (1) high; (-2) locked.
Tap status inverter end: (-1) low; (0) regulating; (1) high; (-2) locked.
